assignment: Independently replay DKR-0 v3, judge its corrected disposition matrix, and classify every direct regression and slop finding as confirmed touched defect, replayable environment-only result, or unresolved.
required_checks: Run the v3 matrix replay and all twelve negative mutations.
Inspect the three corrected concept families and every remove row against current source and frame v2.
Rerun or independently inspect all 23 direct gates. For the two failures, retain exact command, exit, error, touched path, and a replayable comparison against main or an explicit unresolved verdict.
Reproduce the 72 lint diagnostics and two AGENTS graph violations, group by rule and file, and reject duplicates or out-of-scope counts.
Do not call a failure baseline-only without a saved main comparison; do not call an environment failure a product regression without source evidence.
Verify all hashes, checkpoint fields, and wall sources; run store verification after governed output.
forbidden: Product code, tests, docs, manifests, git history, PR state, external services, frame, tree, or another worker's artifacts
Changing the dirty main worktree, installing dependencies, network access, silent baseline dismissal, row correction, or wall weakening
required_outputs: workers/validator-dkr-0-v3/progress.jsonl via the absolute OKRA store helper worker-report command
terminal_condition: Finish with exact matrix judgement, per-failure regression classification, exact slop counts, wall dispositions, and governed output.
